title: Cuneiform Tablet #0836: Early Dynastic Tax Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a tax record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a tax record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Tax Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records tax record matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
